title: Rhabdotosperma bottae
taxonomy: Rhabdotosperma bottae is a species of flowering plant in the family Ixerbaceae. It is native to New Caledonia, a region known for its diverse and endemic plant species. The classification of this plant places it within the genus Rhabdotosperma, which is part of the Ixerbaceae family. Further classification includes its order (Sapindales), class (Magnoliopsida), and division (Angiospermophyta). The specific classification of Rhabdotosperma bottae is a result of ongoing botanical research and classification efforts.
